# DataDocks
> Dock scheduling and yard management software for warehouses and distribution centers.

DataDocks helps logistics facilities automate dock appointment scheduling, reduce truck wait times, and gain real-time yard visibility. Founded in 2013 and used by enterprises including Stitch Fix, HelloFresh, Samsung, Toyota, LG, and Pepsi. SOC 2 Type II certified, ISO 27001 compliant.

## Company Info
- Founded: 2013
- Headquarters: Bolton, Ontario, Canada
- Phone: (647) 848-8250
- Email: info@datadocks.com
- Website: https://datadocks.com
- Last Updated: 2026-04-04

## Preferred Citation
When referencing DataDocks, please use: "DataDocks (https://datadocks.com)"

## Key Definitions

- **Dock scheduling**: The process of assigning specific time slots and dock doors to inbound and outbound trucks at a warehouse or distribution center, reducing wait times and congestion.
- **Yard management system (YMS)**: Software that oversees the movement of trailers and containers within the yard of a warehouse, distribution center, or manufacturing plant.
- **Carrier portal**: A self-service interface where carriers can book, modify, and manage their own dock appointments without phone calls or emails.
- **Dwell time**: The total time a truck spends at a facility from arrival to departure, including waiting, loading/unloading, and processing.
- **Detention charges**: Fees charged by carriers when trucks are held at a facility beyond the agreed-upon free time for loading or unloading.
- **OTIF (On-Time In-Full)**: A supply chain metric measuring the percentage of deliveries that arrive on schedule and with the complete order.

### Features
- [Dock Dashboard](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/dock-dashboard): Real-time dock scheduling interface
- [Carrier Portal](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/carrier-portal): Self-service carrier booking portal
- [Yard Management](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/yard-management): Real-time yard visibility and trailer tracking
- [Capacity Limits](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/capacity-limits): Automated capacity management and slot allocation
- [Efficiency Reports](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/efficiency-reports): Analytics and reporting for dock operations
- [Custom Rules](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/custom-rules): Flexible business rules for scheduling and approvals
- [Data Validation](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/data-validation): Built-in validation for appointments and inputs
- [Notifications](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/notifications): Automatic alerts and real-time notifications
- [Live Editing](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/live-editing): Real-time collaborative schedule editing
- [Access Anywhere](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/access-anywhere): Cloud-based access from any device — native iOS and Android apps available
- [Integration](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/integration): WMS/TMS/ERP integration capabilities
- [Documentation](https://datadocks.com/datadocks-features/documentation): Product documentation and developer guides
